A three-chapter dual-POV contemporary romance. POV alternates between
Saoirse, a Belfast cellist on a one-month residency in Lisbon, and
Tomás, the Portuguese conservatory's instrument-loan archivist. The
inciting damaged-cello bow forces them to spend the month sharing the
restoration room.

Three chapters: (1) meet (Saoirse arrives, the bow has split overnight,
they are introduced over its repair), (2) conflict + dark moment (a
career offer in Berlin would let her leave a week early; a fellowship
in São Paulo would have Tomás leaving the same week), (3) resolution
(both choose to defer; HEA: explicit shared decision to stay through
the residency and re-evaluate). Sensual, not explicit.
